title: React Basics
author: 365 Careers
description: Learn the fundamentals of React: components, JSX, props, and state.
whatYouWillLearn: Build React components and compose UIs with JSX
Manage data with props and component state
Handle events and controlled form inputs
Structure small apps and organize components

title: TypeScript Essentials
author: Code Academy
description: Get started with TypeScript: types, interfaces, generics, and tooling for safer JavaScript.
whatYouWillLearn: Set up a TypeScript project and compiler options
Declare types, interfaces, and generics effectively
Use TypeScript with modern tooling and bundlers
Refactor JS codebases to TypeScript safely

title: Redux Toolkit & Modern State Management
author: Code Academy
description: Learn Redux Toolkit patterns: slices, RTK Query, and best practices for scalable state management.
whatYouWillLearn: Create slices and reducers with Redux Toolkit
Normalize and structure scalable Redux stores
Use RTK Query for data fetching and caching
Apply testing and debugging best practices

title: Express Authentication & Authorization
author: Code Academy
description: Implement secure login flows with JWT, sessions, and role-based access control in Express.
whatYouWillLearn: Implement JWT- and session-based authentication
Protect routes with role-based access control
Harden Express apps against common threats
Design secure login and password flows

title: MongoDB Basics
author: KRISHAI Technologies
description: Learn document modeling, CRUD operations, indexing, and aggregation in MongoDB.
whatYouWillLearn: Model documents and collections effectively
Perform CRUD operations with drivers
Use indexes for query performance
Write aggregation pipelines for insights

title: Docker Basics
author: KRISHAI Technologies
description: Build, tag, and run containers; write efficient Dockerfiles and manage images.
whatYouWillLearn: Understand images, containers, and layers
Write efficient, secure Dockerfiles
Use volumes and networking for apps
Tag, push, and pull images from registries

title: Kubernetes Intro
author: Code Academy
description: Core K8s concepts: pods, deployments, services, and basic YAML configuration.
whatYouWillLearn: Deploy workloads using pods and deployments
Expose services and understand networking
Work with manifests and K8s YAML
Operate clusters with basic kubectl commands

title: Git & GitHub Workflow
author: 365 Careers
description: Branching strategies, pull requests, code reviews, and release tagging.
whatYouWillLearn: Use branching and merging strategies effectively
Open pull requests and conduct code reviews
Resolve conflicts and maintain clean history
Version releases and tags with best practices

title: Testing React & Node with Jest
author: Code Academy
description: Write unit and integration tests with Jest, React Testing Library, and supertest.
whatYouWillLearn: Write unit tests with Jest and Mocks
Test React components with RTL
Test APIs with supertest
Measure coverage and debug failing tests

title: Prisma ORM with Node.js
author: KRISHAI Technologies
description: Model data with Prisma, run migrations, and build type-safe queries in Node.js.
whatYouWillLearn: Define Prisma schema and relations
Run migrations and seed databases
Query data with the Prisma Client
Integrate Prisma in Node/Express apps

title: GraphQL Basics
author: Code Academy
description: Define schemas, write resolvers, and query GraphQL from clients with best practices.
whatYouWillLearn: Design GraphQL schemas and types
Implement resolvers for queries and mutations
Fetch data from clients safely and efficiently
Apply validation, pagination, and caching patterns

title: React Native Intro
author: KRISHAI Technologies
description: Build native mobile apps with React Native: components, navigation, and APIs.
whatYouWillLearn: Build mobile UIs with core RN components
Navigate screens with modern routers
Access device APIs (camera, storage, network)
Optimize and debug React Native apps

title: Python Automation Basics
author: 365 Careers
description: Automate tasks with Python: files, APIs, schedulers, and simple web scraping.
whatYouWillLearn: Automate filesystem and text processing tasks
Call APIs and handle JSON & errors
Schedule jobs and run CLI scripts
Scrape simple pages responsibly
